ministry_department: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
short_description: Financial assistance for OBC students studying in classes 9 and 10 to prevent dropouts and encourage education.
detailed_description: The Pre-Matric Scholarship Scheme for OBC students aims to provide financial assistance to students belonging to Other Backward Classes studying in classes 9 and 10. The scheme helps in preventing dropouts and encourages OBC students to continue their education. The scholarship covers maintenance allowance and reimbursement of compulsory non-refundable fees charged by schools.
key_benefits: Day scholars: ₹225 per month for 10 months (₹2,250 per year)
Hostellers: ₹525 per month for 10 months (₹5,250 per year)
Direct transfer to student's bank account
income_criteria: Parental income not exceeding ₹1 Lakh per annum
other_conditions: Must belong to OBC category (non-creamy layer)
Must be studying in Class 9 or 10 in government or recognized school
Parental income from all sources should not exceed ₹1 Lakh per annum
Only two children of the same parents/guardian are eligible
Must have passed previous class examination

REQUIRED_DOCUMENTS.description: Valid OBC (non-creamy layer) certificate issued by competent authority
Parental income certificate not exceeding ₹1 Lakh per annum
Proof of passing previous class examination
Certificate from school confirming current enrollment
Student's bank account for scholarship transfer
Required only if claiming hostel allowance

application_steps_online: Visit National Scholarship Portal at scholarships.gov.in
Register as new user with valid email and mobile number
Verify email and mobile through OTP
Login and select 'Pre-Matric Scholarship for OBC Students'
Fill application form with personal, academic and income details
Upload all required documents in specified format (PDF/JPG)
Submit application and save application ID for tracking
Track application status through portal using application ID
application_steps_offline: Contact your school principal or scholarship coordinator
Obtain Pre-Matric OBC scholarship application form
Fill the form completely with accurate information
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents
Submit to school authorities before deadline
School will verify and forward applications to district authorities
Follow up with school for application status

submission_locations.notes: School will verify documents and forward application to district education office

faq.question: What is non-creamy layer certificate?
faq.answer: Non-creamy layer certificate proves that your family income is below the creamy layer limit and you belong to socially and educationally backward classes.

faq.question: Can private school students apply?
faq.answer: Yes, students from both government and private recognized schools are eligible.

faq.question: What is the income limit?
faq.answer: Parental income from all sources should not exceed ₹1 Lakh per annum.

common_rejection_reasons: More than two siblings already receiving scholarship
tips_for_successful_application: Ensure OBC certificate is non-creamy layer and valid
Get income certificate from Tehsildar or competent authority
Keep application ID safe for tracking
